title: scilla obtusifolia subsp. intermedia
intro: Scilla obtusifolia subsp. intermedia, also known as the intermediate scilla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family (Liliaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Scilla obtusifolia subsp. intermedia can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or topical application, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
